final_message:
All 6 tests pass. Both bugs were in `lrucache/cache.py`:

1. **`get` didn't refresh recency** — a hit returned the value without moving the entry to the MRU end of the `OrderedDict`, so recently read keys were still evicted first. Fixed by adding `move_to_end(key)` on a non-expired hit (cache.py:30).
2. **`put` evicted on in-place updates** — the eviction check was purely size-based, so overwriting an existing key in a full cache wrongly evicted another entry even though the cache wasn't growing. Fixed by only evicting when the key isn't already present (cache.py:34).

`SOLUTION.md` is written with the same explanation, and `python3 -m pytest -q` reports `6 passed`.
